'''lapuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feastful|feastful]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feastful|feastful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lapuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læpiwith|læpiwith]] || [[word:læpiwij|læpiwij]] || [[word:læpiwish|læpiwish]] || [[word:læpiwi|læpiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lapupuwuth|lapupuwuth]] || [[word:lapupuwuj|lapupuwuj]] || [[word:lapupuwush|lapupuwush]] || [[word:lapupuwu|lapupuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lapuwuth|lapuwuth]] || [[word:lapuwuj|lapuwuj]] || [[word:lapuwush|lapuwush]] || [[word:lapuwu|lapuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lapufwuth|lapufwuth]] || [[word:lapufwuj|lapufwuj]] || [[word:lapufwush|lapufwush]] || [[word:lapufwuf|lapufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lapuwuthu|lapuwuthu]] || [[word:lapuwuju|lapuwuju]] || [[word:lapuwushu|lapuwushu]] || [[word:lapuwuku|lapuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lapuwuth|lapuwuth]] || [[word:lapuwuj|lapuwuj]] || [[word:lapuwush|lapuwush]] || [[word:lapuwu|lapuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lapuwuthul|lapuwuthul]] || [[word:lapuwujul|lapuwujul]] || [[word:lapuwushul|lapuwushul]] || [[word:lapuwukul|lapuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lapuwuthuthu|lapuwuthuthu]] || [[word:lapuwujuju|lapuwujuju]] || [[word:lapuwushushu|lapuwushushu]] || [[word:lapuwuku|lapuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lapuwuthun|lapuwuthun]] || [[word:lapuwujun|lapuwujun]] || [[word:lapuwushun|lapuwushun]] || [[word:lapuwukun|lapuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lapuwuthuoro|lapuwuthuoro]] || [[word:lapuwujuoro|lapuwujuoro]] || [[word:lapuwushuoro|lapuwushuoro]] || [[word:lapuwukuoro|lapuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
